title: assertion failed on
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_table (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
SELECT name FROM test_table ORDER BY age;
SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE age IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC;
